mainEntity.name: Cost comparison: DIY vs agency for Houston Perplexity AEO?
mainEntity.text: Cost comparison: DIY vs agency for Houston Perplexity AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: DIY Houston AEO costs $500-$2k/month in time/tools; agencies $3k-$7k/month with faster results.

suggestedAnswer.text: DIY suits solos; agencies handle audits/schema. Houston oil/gas law niches justify investment.
